projectDescription: A React single-page application for browsing and searching Marvel and DC Comics superheroes, featuring authentication, protected routes, and real-time hero search.
keyFeatures: Marvel and DC Comics hero catalog with 20 heroes
Real-time hero search by name using query string parameters
Protected routes using PrivateRoute and PublicRoute guards
Hero detail pages with alter ego, publisher, and first appearance info
Responsive card-based UI with CSS animations
Jest + React Testing Library test suite
publicApiSurface: HeroCard: React component — { id, superhero, alter_ego, first_appearance, characters }
HeroList: React component — { publisher: 'DC Comics' | 'Marvel Comics' }
PrivateRoute: route guard component — redirects to /login if not logged in
PublicRoute: route guard component — redirects to /marvel if already logged in
